verdict_reason: Derived query method follows the existing repository conventions; only an indexing note

todos.issue: findByReferenceNumberAndStatusIn queries referenceNumber + status but the Notification document declares no @Indexed/@CompoundIndex, so the dashboard search is a collection scan on every keystroke-driven request
todos.fix: Add an index on referenceNumber (it is already the natural key) via @Indexed on the Notification field or a compound index definition
